heading: Purpose
label: 21502 Purpose
text: The purpose of the corporation is to maintain a hospital in the vicinity of Paris, France, to provide medical and surgical care to citizens of the United States.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)2150236:4903 (words before 8th comma less “gratuitously or otherwise”).(words before 8th comma less “gratuitously or otherwise”), .Jan. 30, 1913, ch. 21, § 337 Stat. 654The word “maintain” is substituted for “establish, maintain, and conduct” to eliminate executed and unnecessary words. The word “aid” is omitted as included in “care”.
